_publications._publicationTitle: Ras-driven transcriptome analysis identifies aurora kinase A as a potential malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor therapeutic target.

_contextSnippet: Inhibiting Aurora kinase with MLN8237 diminished tumor volume and increased survival (p=0.0005). Notably only one of 11 mice treated with MLN8237 required sacrifice within a prolonged (66 day) treatment period
details: Diminished tumor volume and increased survival (p=0.0005) in nu/nu mice at 20 mg/kg/dose. Only one of 11 mice treated with MLN8237 required sacrifice within a prolonged (66 day) treatment period.
